prompt: Hyperrealistic intimate living room portrait of a stunning Korean woman seated sideways on a plush cream-toned sofa during nighttime, her body angled away while she glances softly back over her shoulder toward the lens with a bashful gentle smile. Warm ambient apartment glow blended with subtle authentic iPhone flash for soft highlight pops and cinematic shadow play. Cozy Korean-style living space with cream furnishings, fluffy throw blankets, plush cushions, lit candles, warm-toned table lamps, pastel floral arrangements, aesthetic coffee table styling.
